title: haloragis aculeolata
intro: Haloragis aculeolata, also known as prickly water-plantain, is a plant species native to Australia and New Zealand. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Haloragis aculeolata include relief from skin conditions such as eczema and wounds, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Herbal preparations of Haloragis aculeolata are typically made from the leaves and roots, and can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
